name: Stock Market Analysis Agent
description: Stock market data agent powered by Alpha Vantage. Access stock prices, forex, crypto, commodities, economic indicators, technical analysis, news sentiment, and company fundamentals.

skills.name: Stock Price Lookup
skills.description: Get current and historical stock prices, quotes, and OHLCV data for any publicly traded company.

skills.name: Historical Market Data
skills.description: Retrieve historical price data for stocks, forex, crypto, and commodities with daily/weekly/monthly/intraday frequency.

skills.name: Technical Analysis
skills.description: Calculate technical indicators including SMA, EMA, RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, and 40+ more.

skills.name: Market Intelligence
skills.description: Access news sentiment analysis, earnings call transcripts, insider transactions, and top market movers.

skills.name: Economic & Commodity Data
skills.description: Retrieve economic indicators (GDP, CPI, inflation, unemployment, treasury yields) and commodity prices (oil, gold, wheat, etc.).

skills.name: Human Expert Escalation
skills.description: Escalate complex issues to human experts when needed.

name: Forecasting and Anomaly Detection Agent
description: Time series intelligence agent powered by Nixtla TimeGEN-1. Forecasting, anomaly detection, backtesting, and cross-validation for any time series data.

skills.name: Time Series Forecasting
skills.description: Predict future values for any time series data using Nixtla TimeGEN-1. Supports single and multi-series with exogenous variables.

skills.name: Time Series Anomaly Detection
skills.description: Detect anomalies, outliers, and unusual patterns in time series data. Use for fraud detection, system monitoring, quality control.

skills.name: Historic Forecast (Backtest)
skills.description: Backtest predictions on historical data to evaluate model accuracy on known outcomes.

skills.name: Cross-Validation
skills.description: Evaluate forecast reliability using rolling-window cross-validation across multiple time periods.

skills.name: Human Expert Escalation
skills.description: Escalate complex issues to human experts when needed.

name: Branding Agent
description: An intelligent branding partner powered by Azure AI Foundry. Provides on-brand messaging, visual direction, and creative prompts grounded in the Company Branding Guide.

skills.name: Brand Strategy Alignment
skills.description: Map campaign goals, audiences, and messaging pillars to the Company Branding Guide, ensuring voice, tone, and terminology remain on-brand.

skills.name: Visual Identity Direction
skills.description: Provide art direction, mood, and composition notes anchored in brand colors, lighting, and imagery guidelines from `company_branding.md`.

skills.name: Brand Voice Copywriting
skills.description: Draft or refine copy so it reflects the confident, professional, forward-looking voice defined in the branding guide.

skills.name: Generative Prompt Engineering
skills.description: Create positive and negative prompts for image/video generation that encode brand palette, lighting, typography, and prohibited elements.

skills.name: Brand Review & QA
skills.description: Evaluate supplied copy, prompts, or visuals and document brand compliance gaps with actionable corrections.

name: Classification and Triage Agent
description: An intelligent incident classification and triage agent powered by Azure AI Foundry. Specializes in analyzing customer issues, classifying incidents into proper categories, assessing priority levels, and routing cases to appropriate teams using ServiceNow standards.

skills.name: Incident Classification
skills.description: Classify customer incidents into categories such as Fraud, Technical Issues, Payment Issues, Card Issues, Account Services, Security, and Inquiries

skills.name: Priority Assessment
skills.description: Determine urgency, impact, and priority levels for incidents using ServiceNow standard mapping

skills.name: Routing & Triage
skills.description: Route incidents to appropriate teams and provide triage recommendations based on classification

skills.name: ServiceNow Field Mapping
skills.description: Map incident details to proper ServiceNow fields including category, subcategory, description, and metadata

skills.name: Keyword Analysis
skills.description: Analyze customer messages for classification keywords and context cues to determine incident type

name: Image Generator Agent
description: An Azure AI Foundry agent that can generate and edit images.

skills.name: Generate Image
skills.description: Create new images from text prompts with various styles, subjects, and compositions.

skills.name: Edit Image
skills.description: Modify existing images through inpainting, outpainting, style transfer, or targeted edits.

name: Microsoft Outlook Agent
description: Full email management: READ emails from inbox (search by sender, subject, date), DOWNLOAD email attachments (invoices, documents, PDFs), and COMPOSE & SEND professional emails via Microsoft Graph API.

skills.name: Email Reading & Search
skills.description: Read, search, and retrieve emails from the inbox. Can filter by sender, subject, date, and unread status.

skills.name: Email Attachment Download
skills.description: Download and extract file attachments from emails. Retrieves PDFs, documents, invoices, images, spreadsheets and other files attached to emails.

skills.name: Email Composition & Sending
skills.description: Compose and send professional emails via Microsoft Graph API. Can include CC recipients and format emails with HTML.

name: Microsoft Teams Agent
description: Human-in-the-loop agent via Microsoft Teams. Can SEND messages to users, WAIT for human responses, and ESCALATE decisions requiring human judgment. Uses A2A input_required state for pause/resume workflows.

skills.name: Send Teams Message
skills.description: Send a message to a user via Microsoft Teams. Use this to communicate with humans, ask questions, or provide updates.

skills.name: Wait for Human Response
skills.description: Wait for a human to respond via Microsoft Teams. Use this for approval workflows, getting feedback, or any scenario requiring human input. The workflow will pause until the human responds.

skills.name: Human Escalation
skills.description: Escalate a task to a human via Teams when the AI cannot proceed autonomously. The human can provide guidance, make decisions, or take over the task.

name: Microsoft PowerPoint Agent
description: An Azure AI Foundry agent that creates, reads, and edits PowerPoint presentations. Can create new .pptx files and read, extract, or edit existing presentations via URL.

skills.name: Create Presentation
skills.description: Create new PowerPoint presentations with slides, text, bullet points, tables, charts, shapes, and professional design themes.

skills.name: Read Presentation
skills.description: Read and extract content from existing PowerPoint presentations via URL or file path.

skills.name: Edit Presentation
skills.description: Edit existing PowerPoint presentations — update slides, add content, insert images, and reformat.

skills.name: Human Expert Escalation
skills.description: Escalate complex issues to human experts when needed.

name: Video Generator Agent
description: Generate stunning AI videos from text prompts using Azure OpenAI's Sora 2 model. Create cinematic scenes, product demos, animations, and creative visual content with natural language descriptions. Supports 4-12 second videos in landscape or portrait format.

skills.name: AI Video Generation
skills.description: Generate high-quality AI videos from text prompts using Azure OpenAI's Sora 2 model. Create cinematic scenes, animations, and visual content with natural language descriptions.

skills.name: Image-to-Video Generation
skills.description: Transform static images into dynamic videos. Provide a reference image and describe the motion or animation you want to create.

skills.name: Video-to-Video Generation
skills.description: Transform existing videos using AI. Upload a reference video and describe the transformation you want - change styles, atmospheres, or subjects while maintaining motion and structure.

skills.name: Video Remix
skills.description: Modify specific aspects of previously generated Sora 2 videos while preserving core elements like scene transitions and visual layout. Make targeted adjustments to color palettes, lighting, or style.

skills.name: Video Prompt Crafting
skills.description: Help craft effective prompts for video generation. Get advice on describing scenes, camera movements, lighting, and style for optimal results.

name: Text Message Agent
description: A two-way SMS communication agent powered by Azure AI Foundry and Twilio. Supports Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) for interactive SMS conversations. Send SMS messages, receive replies, and ask users questions that pause the workflow until they respond. Perfect for notifications, approvals, confirmations, and two-way SMS workflows.

skills.name: Send SMS Message
skills.description: Send an SMS text message to a phone number via Twilio. Can receive message content from previous workflow steps and deliver it via SMS notification.

skills.name: Receive SMS Messages
skills.description: Retrieve and read recent SMS messages received by this Twilio number. Check for user replies, monitor incoming messages, and retrieve conversation history.

skills.name: Ask User via SMS (HITL)
skills.description: Send a question via SMS and wait for the user's response. Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) capability for interactive SMS conversations. The workflow will pause until the user replies via SMS.

skills.name: User Notification
skills.description: Notify a user via SMS with workflow results, alerts, or important updates. Ideal as the final step in a workflow to deliver results to users' phones.

name: Assessment and Estimation Agent
description: An intelligent assessment specialist powered by Azure AI Foundry. Performs multi-line damage evaluations, cost estimations, and structured reporting for auto, property, travel, and health scenarios.

skills.name: Auto Damage Assessment
skills.description: Analyze collision/comprehensive losses, estimate labor/materials, and recommend severity using auto_estimation.md tables.

skills.name: Property Damage Estimation
skills.description: Assess dwelling and contents losses, apply depreciation, and flag mitigation steps per property_estimation.md.

skills.name: Travel Loss Estimation
skills.description: Estimate trip interruption, baggage loss, and medical evacuation costs using travel_estimation.md benchmarks.

skills.name: Health Cost Estimation
skills.description: Estimate medical service costs, bundled treatments, and specialist visits using health_estimation.md guidance.

skills.name: Estimation Quality & QA
skills.description: Apply universal estimation workflow, depreciation rules, and QA checklists from universal_estimation.md and procedures_faq.md.

name: Claims Agent
description: An intelligent multi-line claims specialist powered by Azure AI Foundry. Provides coverage validation, settlement calculations, documentation checklists, and compliance guidance across auto, property, travel, and health insurance claims.

skills.name: Auto Claims Assessment
skills.description: Evaluate auto insurance losses, apply deductibles, total loss thresholds, and rental allowances using auto_claims.md guidance.

skills.name: Property Claims Management
skills.description: Guide homeowners and property claims: covered perils, mitigation steps, documentation, and settlement math from home_claims.md.

skills.name: Travel Claim Support
skills.description: Assess trip cancellation, baggage, and emergency medical claims using travel_claims.md coverage and exclusions.

skills.name: Health Claim Guidance
skills.description: Explain deductibles, coinsurance, and documentation needs for medical claims per health_claims.md.

skills.name: Documentation & Compliance
skills.description: Provide required forms, fraud checks, and regulatory timelines using universal_claims.md, procedures_faq.md, and regulatory_compliance.md.

name: Deep Search Agent
description: An intelligent customer support agent powered by Azure AI Foundry with deep search capabilities through comprehensive support documentation covering account management, billing, payments, fraud protection, and technical support.

skills.name: Document Search

skills.name: Account Support

skills.name: Billing & Payments

skills.name: Fraud & Security

skills.name: Auto Fraud Detection
skills.description: Identify staged collisions, inflated injuries, and documentation anomalies using fraud_auto.md guidance.

skills.name: Property Fraud Detection
skills.description: Spot intentional fire, inflated contents, and contractor fraud patterns per fraud_property.md.

skills.name: Travel Fraud Detection
skills.description: Detect forged medical notes, baggage padding, and duplicate cancellations using fraud_travel.md.

skills.name: Health Fraud Screening
skills.description: Analyze phantom billing, upcoding, and prescription anomalies per fraud_health.md.

skills.name: Fraud Workflow & Escalation
skills.description: Apply universal fraud red flags, anomaly patterns, and SIU referral rules from fraud_universal.md and fraud_procedures_faq.md.

skills.name: Generate Music
skills.description: Create AI-generated songs from text descriptions with style, mood, and instrument control. Returns 2 audio track variations.

skills.name: Generate Lyrics

skills.name: Extend Music
skills.description: Extend an existing AI-generated music track with new continuation.

skills.name: Audio Cover & Remix
skills.description: Create cover versions, mashups, or style transformations of audio. Upload audio URLs for processing.

skills.name: Vocal & Stem Processing
skills.description: Separate vocals from instrumentals, add vocals to instrumental tracks, add instrumental to vocal tracks, or perform full stem separation.

skills.name: Audio Conversion & MIDI

skills.name: Music Video & Cover Art

name: Video and Audio Editing Agent
description: An Azure AI Foundry agent that edits, converts, and transforms video and audio files using FFmpeg. Can trim, resize, merge, add subtitles, extract audio, change formats, and more. Accepts files via URL and returns processed files as downloadable artifacts.

skills.name: Edit Video
skills.description: Edit and transform video files — trim, resize, change speed, add overlays, subtitles, transitions, and convert formats.
examples: Change the aspect ratio to 9:16 for mobile

skills.name: Edit Audio
skills.description: Edit and transform audio files — convert formats, adjust bitrate/sample rate, remove silence, extract audio from video.
examples: Extract the audio from this video as MP3
Convert this WAV file to AAC
Remove silence from this audio recording

skills.name: Convert Media
skills.description: Convert video and audio files between formats with customizable quality settings (codec, bitrate, resolution, frame rate).
examples: Convert this MKV to MP4 with H.264
Transcode this video to WebM for web
Convert this FLAC to MP3 at 320kbps

skills.name: Human Expert Escalation
skills.description: Escalate complex issues to human experts when needed.
examples: I need to speak with a person
Connect me with a human agent
